title: Warm Bokeh Stylized Snack Character Product Photo AI
sourceTitle: Warm Bokeh Stylized Snack Character Product Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 vertical hyper-detailed snack-character product photo of cat-shaped tortilla chips in red paper snack bag with large illustrated cartoon cat, simple facial features, soft pastel tones, and matte paper texture. Subject: cat-shaped tortilla chips is rendered as a cute edible character with cat-head chips with pointed ears, golden-orange crispy bubbled surface, dot eyes, curved mouth, and thin whisker lines, extreme detail, sharp focus, and a playful food-product personality. Scene: chips holding miniature cheeseburger, red-striped soda cup, triangular cheese slice, and extra chips outside the bag surrounds the snack characters while the warm golden bokeh background stays out of focus with strong subject separation. Composition: Tight vertical product framing, slightly above eye level or medium close-up depending on the snack, container centered or dominant, main character cluster in sharp focus, extra snack pieces arranged at the base. Signature Elements: Preserved warm bokeh stylized snack character product photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: 8K ultra high definition, hyper-detailed photorealistic food character styling with stylized realism, crisp snack textures, matte paper or cardboard container detail, and polished commercial snack-campaign finish. Color Palette: Warm tones, golden highlights, soft shadows, appetizing fried oranges or popcorn whites, red packaging accents, pastel illustration details, and golden bokeh background. Lighting: Warm cinematic lighting, golden bokeh background, shallow depth of field, soft highlights on crispy surfaces, clean package visibility, and strong subject separation. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Warm Bokeh Stylized Snack Character Product Photo Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3:4 vertical hyper-detailed snack-character product photo of sheep-shaped popcorn figures in classic red-and-white vertical striped popcorn bucket with matte cardboard finish. Subject: sheep-shaped popcorn figures is rendered as a cute edible character with bodies made entirely of popcorn kernels, smooth white rounded faces, small rounded ears, black dot eyes, and thin curved smiles, extreme detail, sharp focus, and a playful food-product personality. Scene: one sheep wearing red-blue 3D glasses, one holding a small popcorn bucket, one holding a black TV remote, with popcorn scattered at the base surrounds the snack characters while the warm golden bokeh background stays out of focus with strong subject separation.
